description.unified: Grants all allies a shield that absorbs damage for [7 sec->4sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Power is increased by [65%->120%] and Status Resistance is increased by [600->800]. [(removed) target’s ATK increases by 25%]

Deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for [3.5 sec->2sec]. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of [500->800]. [(removed) increases Magic DMG taken by 25% for 10 sec]

description.from: Deals 177*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+110.8% ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6 times, then inflicts Blind for 3.5 sec, and increases Magic DMG taken by 25% for 10 sec. This skill applies Critical Rate 500 higher.
description.to: Deals 177*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 110.8% of ATK Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for 2sec. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of 800.

description.unified: Every [14 sec->20sec], restores [15%->14% of Max HP] to the [1->2] allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF for [7 sec->15sec]. [(removed) Magic DMG taken is reduced by 15%.]

dark.unified: Healed allies take [25%->40%] less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.

light.unified: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle.

dark.unified: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%.
